subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and unwavering trustee! The honeyed mouth of praise hath opened to extol thee, and sweet utterance hath been loosed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ امین در ستایش شما دهان شکرین باز نموده و نطق شیرین گشاده که الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
